subcodes.first_line: The Pen proclaimeth betwixt the worlds and beareth glad tidings unto the peoples of the Most Great Name, through which hath flowed the Kawthar of Life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی القلم بین العالم و یبشر الامم بالاسم الاعظم الذی به جری کوثر الحیوان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @law of Huququ'llah, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom
